segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. My smartphone just froze yet again. I can't believe it. And it's pretty much a brand new one. Have you tried restarting it? Sometimes a simple reboot can solve the problem. I've restarted it multiple times, but the issue persists. It might be worth checking if there are any software updates available. Done that too. It's still under warranty, so I'll mail it back and ask for a replacement, but I'll have no phone for a few days.
